## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue - e.g., typo, broken link)
- [ ] New content (non-breaking change which adds new documentation chapters)
- [ ] Breaking change (restructuring chapters that might break existing links)
- [ ] Visual enhancement (adding diagrams, screenshots, or formatting)

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code/text follows the style guidelines of this project (Beginner Friendly, Simple English)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own text
- [ ] I have commented my scripts (if any), particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the Table of Contents or README if applicable
- [ ] My changes generate no new markdown linting warnings
- [ ] Any new diagrams (Mermaid) render correctly
